title: Kagenti’s Approach to Multi-Agent Security for AI Agents
summary: Kagenti is a security solution for multi-agent AI systems that uses identity-based controls, delegation chains, and open source infrastructure to prevent data leaks and breaches. It addresses the risk of confused agents leaking data in production agentic AI deployments.
writeup: The video explains Kagenti, a security solution for multi-agent AI systems that relies on identity-based controls, delegation chains, and open source infrastructure. It targets a concrete production risk: confused agents leaking data, which can lead to breaches in agentic AI deployments. Key takeaways include how identity-based security and zero-trust principles apply to interacting agents, and how delegation chains track authority as tasks pass between them.
